image_prompt: A comical and slightly dramatic scene of a person with an exaggeratedly rumbling stomach, perhaps with cartoonish sound waves emanating from it. They are looking longingly at a single, perfectly rendered, delicious-looking slice of pizza (or a burger). Their expression should be one of intense hunger mixed with anticipation. The text "Bateu a fome? Hora de comer!" is integrated as if written on a chef's hat, or on a speech bubble coming from the person's stomach, or even on the plate of food itself, in a bold, appetizing font. The background could be a simple, warm kitchen or a cozy dining setting. High detail on the food, expressive character.
short_sentence: Bateu a fome? Hora de comer!
caption: Aquele barulhinho na barriga que não mente! 🚨 Quando a fome bate, não tem desculpa, a solução é uma só: comer! Qual a primeira coisa que você pensa em devorar quando a larica ataca? Me conta! 🍔🍕 #Fome #HoraDeComer #CoisaObvia #Larica #ComidaDeVerdade #HumorGastronomico #InstaFood
